6:[["$","meta","0",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}],["$","meta","1",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","title","2",{"children":"Reproduce · Deep-Research Arena"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"description","content":"An independent leaderboard for open-source deep-research agents — evaluated on a sealed sandbox of Magento, Postmill, and Wikipedia."}],["$","link","4",{"rel":"icon","href":"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 32 32'%3E%3Crect width='32' height='32' rx='6' fill='%23111827'/%3E%3Ctext x='50%25' y='55%25' fill='white' font-family='Inter,Arial' font-size='13' font-weight='700' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='middle'%3EDR%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E"}]]
1:null
